OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 23, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: LESLIE C. UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, RESPONDENT JOSEPH BURKE, ADAM BRISTOL, INDRE VISKONTAS NOTICE OF MOITON AND MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL FILED OCT-11-2013 IS DENIED. NO TENTATIVE RULING DENYING PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION HAS BEEN IN EFFECT ON OCTOBER 11, 2013. ON SEPTEMBER 23, 2013 JUDGE DORFMAN SPECIFICALLY STATED THAT DUE TO THE FACT THAT PETITIONER WAS NOT SERVED WITH THE OPPOSITION PAPERS IN TIME TO PREPARE FOR ARGUMENT JUDGE DORFMAN WAS "NOT PREPARED TO COME TO A FINAL DECISION" AND "WAS NOT PREPARED TO GO FORWARD" WITH THE HEARING. RESPONDENT'S ARGUMENT THAT PETITIONER WAS DEPRIVED OF ITS RIGHT TO DISMISS THE ACTION WOULD RENDER THE CONTINUANCE OF THE HEARING A HOLLOW GESTURE AND A MOCKERY OF DUE PROCESS. RESPONDENT DOES NOT CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT TRIAL IN THIS CASE WAS COMMENCED WITH FILING OF AN AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, REPORTER BRANDON COMBS, #12978

Mtn To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Eastridge, Esq., Attorney at Law, (510-430-1700), for Paul Wiley, Petitioner and moving party.
James B. Kraus, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-713-8680), for Adam Bristol, Respondent and opposing party.

Both parties submit to the tentative ruling. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER PAUL WILEY Motion To Tax Costs is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Eastridge, Esq., (510-530-1700) for Paul Wiley, Petitioner and moving party.
No appearance by Respondent and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER PAUL WILEY's Motion To Tax Costs is GRANTED as to Memorandum of Costs filed on September 18, 2013, premature. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Filed Oct-11-2013
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Eastridge, Esq., Attorney at Law, (510-530-1700), for Paul Wiley, Petitioner and opposing party.
No appearance by Respondent and moving party.
Brandon Combs, CSR #12978, (415-994-7575).

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT JOSEPH BURKE, ADAM BRISTOL, INDRE VISKONTAS Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Filed Oct-11-2013 is DENIED. No tentative ruling denying Petition to Compel Arbitration has been in effect on October 11, 2013. On September 23, 2013 judge Dorfman specifically stated that due to the fact that petitioner was not served with the opposition papers in time to prepare for argument judge Dorfman was "not prepared to come to a final decision" and "was not prepared to go forward" with the hearing. Respondent's argument that Petitioner was deprived of its right to dismiss the action would render the continuance of the hearing a hollow gesture and a mockery of due process. Respondent does not cite any authority for the proposition that trial in this case was commenced with filing of an Amended Petition to Compel Arbitration. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter Brandon Combs, #12978 (D501)
